option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="66.0" spacing="10.0" styleClass="navbar" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.NavbarController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="10.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="sidebarToggleButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSidebarToggle" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="icon-button" text="=" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<MenuButton fx:id="themeMenuButton" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="menu-icon-button" text="Theme"> <items> <MenuItem fx:id="lightThemeItem" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeLight" text="Clair" /> <MenuItem fx:id="darkThemeItem" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeDark" text="Sombre" /> </items> </MenuButton>
<Button fx:id="notificationsButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onNotificationsClick" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="icon-button" text="!" />
<MenuButton fx:id="userMenuButton" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="avatar-menu" text="Admin"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onProfileClick" text="Profil" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLogoutClick" text="Se deconnecter" /> </items> </MenuButton> </HBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="66.0" spacing="10.0" styleClass="navbar" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.NavbarController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="10.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="sidebarToggleButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSidebarToggle" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="icon-button" text="=" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<MenuButton fx:id="themeMenuButton" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="menu-icon-button" text="Theme"> <items> <MenuItem fx:id="lightThemeItem" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeLight" text="Clair" /> <MenuItem fx:id="darkThemeItem" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeDark" text="Sombre" /> </items> </MenuButton>
<Button fx:id="notificationsButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onNotificationsClick" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="icon-button" text="!" />
<MenuButton fx:id="userMenuButton" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="34.0" styleClass="avatar-menu" text="Admin"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToAdminView" text="Mode admin" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToArtistView" text="Mode artiste" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onProfileClick" text="Profil" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLogoutClick" text="Se deconnecter" /> </items> </MenuButton> </HBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:id="rootPane" fx:controller="controllers.artist.ArtistMainController" prefHeight="820.0" prefWidth="1280.0" styleClass="artist-root"> <top> <fx:include fx:id="navbarInclude" source="NavbarArtiste.fxml"/> </top> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="artist-scroll" vbarPolicy="AS_NEEDED"> <content> <HBox spacing="18.0"> <padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="18.0" bottom="18.0" left="18.0"/> </padding> <VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="artist-left-column" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <fx:include fx:id="profileHeaderInclude" source="ProfileHeader.fxml"/> <StackPane fx:id="artistContentArea" minHeight="400.0" styleClass="artist-page-host" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox> <fx:include fx:id="sidebarArtisteInclude" source="SidebarArtiste.fxml"/> </HBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.BibliothequArtisteController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Ma Bibliotheque" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Ajouter un Livre" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: grille des livres + details + formulaires Ajouter/Modifier." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.CollectionsController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <TextField promptText="Rechercher une collection..." HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Ajouter Collection" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Collections" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: liste accordion + grille d'oeuvres (a implementer)." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.EvenementsArtisteController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Mes evenements" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Ajouter" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: liste des evenements + actions Annuler/Editer/Supprimer." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.MesOeuvresController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <TextField promptText="Recherche par titre" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ComboBox promptText="Type" prefWidth="170.0" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Ajouter une Oeuvre" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Mes Oeuvres" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: filtres + grille de cartes + actions Modifier/Supprimer." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.MusiquesController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <TextField promptText="Recherche musique" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ComboBox promptText="Tri" prefWidth="170.0" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Ajouter une musique" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Musiques" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: liste de pistes + player audio + actions." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="62.0" spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-navbar" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.NavbarArtisteController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="10.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="anchorButton" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="artist-icon-button" text="*" /> <TextField prefHeight="36.0" prefWidth="260.0" promptText="Recherche..." styleClass="artist-search-field" />
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<Button fx:id="notificationsButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onNotificationsClick" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="34.0" styleClass="artist-icon-button" text="!" />
<MenuButton mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="36.0" styleClass="artist-avatar-menu" text="Admin"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSwitchToAdminView" text="Mode admin" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeLight" text="Theme clair" /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onThemeDark" text="Theme sombre" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLogoutClick" text="Se deconnecter" /> </items> </MenuButton> </HBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="0.0" styleClass="profile-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.ProfileHeaderController"> <StackPane prefHeight="190.0" styleClass="profile-cover"> <Label styleClass="cover-title" text="ARTIUM" /> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="profile-body"> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <StackPane prefHeight="88.0" prefWidth="88.0" styleClass="profile-avatar"> <Label styleClass="avatar-text" text="A" /> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="fullNameLabel" styleClass="profile-name" text="Artist Name" /> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="profile-meta" text="Specialite - Ville - Inscrit le" /> </VBox>
<Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEditProfileClick" styleClass="edit-profile-button" text="Edit profile" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="2.0" styleClass="tab-nav"> <padding> <Insets bottom="0.0" left="8.0" right="8.0" top="0.0" /> </padding>
<Button fx:id="collectionsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onCollectionsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Collections" /> <Button fx:id="contentTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDynamicContentClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Mes Oeuvres" /> <Button fx:id="evenementsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onEvenementsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Evenements" /> <Button fx:id="reclamationsTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onReclamationsClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Reclamations" /> <Button fx:id="statistiquesTabButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onStatistiquesClick" styleClass="tab-nav-item" text="Statistiques" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </HBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Tab?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TabPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.ReclamationsArtisteController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Reclamations" /> <TabPane> <tabs> <Tab closable="false" text="Envoyer Reclamation" /> <Tab closable="false" text="Mes Reclamations" /> </tabs> </TabPane> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: formulaire d'envoi + liste filtree + details/reponses." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox prefWidth="320.0" spacing="14.0" styleClass="artist-right-column" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.SidebarArtisteController"> <VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="artist-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding> <Label styleClass="card-title" text="A propos" /> <Label fx:id="bioLabel" styleClass="card-text" text="hello" wrapText="true" /> <Label styleClass="card-text" text="Ne(e): 04 May 1999" /> <Label styleClass="card-text" text="Inscrit le: 11 Apr 2026" /> <Label styleClass="card-text" text="Email: zribiroua789@gmail.com" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="artist-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding> <Label styleClass="card-title" text="Statistiques" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"><Label styleClass="card-text" text="Oeuvres ajoutees" /><Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /><Label styleClass="badge-primary" text="0" /></HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"><Label styleClass="card-text" text="Reclamations faites" /><Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /><Label styleClass="badge-warning" text="0" /></HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"><Label styleClass="card-text" text="Evenements crees" /><Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /><Label styleClass="badge-info" text="0" /></HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"><Label styleClass="card-text" text="Commentaires recus" /><Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /><Label styleClass="badge-success" text="0" /></HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8.0"><Label styleClass="card-text" text="Likes recus" /><Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /><Label styleClass="badge-danger" text="0" /></HBox> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.StatistiquesArtisteController"> <padding><Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /></padding> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Statistiques" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle-small" text="Structure prete: PieChart, LineChart, BarChart, et top amateurs actifs." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
